care.summary: Colorful tropical plant with long sword-shaped leaves in red, purple, and green.
care.fertilizer: Balanced feed every 4-6 weeks in growing season
care.toxicity: Mildly toxic to pets if ingested
common_issues: Brown leaf tips from low humidity or chemicals
Fading color in too much shade
tips: Prune leggy stems to encourage bushiness
Popular in Hawaiian and Polynesian culture
